function.name: veml6070_read
function.signature: static ssize_t veml6070_read(FAR struct file *filep, FAR char *buffer, size_t buflen)

bug.description: memory leak where allocated memory is never freed on certain code paths

prompt:
There is a memory leak where allocated memory is never freed on certain code paths downstream of function veml6070_read in the drivers/sensors subsystem.
The function is located at drivers/sensors/veml6070.c:163.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
